standing: Born as children a (the report/crawler) + b (the learning-loop) of the diagnostic-interpreter ticket cast the same session, instantiating the concept-piece I-complete-diagnostic-on-first-pass — proven infra built ahead of need.

BUILT and PROVEN — report + learning-loop both halves, seven teeth a hollow interpreter could not pass (isolated ordered slice, read-never-mutate, learned-then-required, loud recurrence); green bare and sealed under the tester with the VALIDATION persisted beside-code.

REFACTORED to the true shape Akien named — diagnostic_interpreter -> diagnostic_inspector, assemble(records,pointer) -> Inspector(registry).inspect(log,*filters), report -> FINDINGS. The three parts of the diagnostic surface made explicit (logging=state->instance-space, callback=event-fired inspect-now, inspector=reacts+filters+findings); the Mailbox demoted to a v0 proof STAND-IN for the ~/.cairn/ breadcrumb log; FILTERS compose (by_pointer AND by_gate) with an 8th tooth proving the conjunction; the learning-loop routed THROUGH the Inspector (the inspector is what gets better). The EXPLICIT REMIT captured as the charter first field: save CC tokens exploring an issue as the prebuild step does for coding, and get better over time (the debugging analog of prebuild; Law 1, the cocoon). Same proven engine, re-seated on the intention. The interpreter-life records of truth (early history entries + validations/test_interpreter.json) preserved under their true identity (Law 7); this is a new appended event with a NEW netns seal.
